39.reason: cur2 must be reset inside the outer loop; otherwise, after the first iteration of cur1, cur2 becomes NULL and subsequent cur1 terms are not processed.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  cur2 must be reset inside the outer loop; otherwise, after the first iteration of cur1, cur2 becomes NULL and subsequent cur1 terms are not processed.

44.reason: cur2 should be reset to s2->first at the start of each outer iteration; otherwise only the first term of s1 is multiplied.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  cur2 should be reset to s2->first at the start of each outer iteration; otherwise only the first term of s1 is multiplied.

98.reason: [After finishing inner loop for one term of s1, cur2 must be reset to s2->first to process next term of s1 with all terms of s2. Without this reset, the inner loop runs only once.]
